title: Dashta eel

The '''Dashta eels''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Eel/Legends|eels]] native to [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]] and unknown to the outside [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. Immature ones were the size of a clenched [[Human/Legends|Human]] fist when coiled, and had blind [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. The young had no [[Gender/Legends|sexes]]; after they matured, they entered into sexual differentiation, gained a form of [[Sentience/Legends|sentience]], and grew larger. Unfertilized [[Egg/Legends|eggs]] develop into Dashta eels that remained immature and non-sentient. The head eels were [[the Guides]].

Dashta eels were from the [[Zantay Caves]], and were worshiped by the [[X'Ting]] for thousands of [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. They were named after [[Kilaphor Dashta]].

The unfertilized Dashta eels were given to the X'Ting so that they could make [[JK-13 security droid|JK-series droids]]. Although these unfertilized specimens were not sentient, they still demonstrated a profound level of [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitivity]], making them the first known example of non-sentient Force sensitives. The sentient, adult Dashta eels also gave the X'Ting the first [[Fungus/Legends|fungal]] spores used for food and medicine long ago. The mad [[Geneticist/Legends|geneticist]] [[Zeta Magnus]] experimented with dashta tissue during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
